calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Transfering Property To Trust
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Fraser for Robert Lalanne (Trustee).

Mr. Fraser stated that he submitted a supplement to the petition, that he is deleting the request to have the First Republic account transferred into the Trust and provided a revised order reflecting the above. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Property is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

Petition For Order Transfering Property To Trust
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Continued To Jan-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
